footer.tagline: Data-driven AI agents for support, sales, and automation.
footer.builtFor: Built for high-conviction support, sales, and automation teams.

hero.title: Help, support, and sell with a data-driven AI agent.
hero.description: ZazuBot instantly helps your customers using AI-generated responses. Get 24/7 support, improve satisfaction, and convert more conversations into qualified leads.
hero.buildDesignDeploy: Build, Design and deploy your flow
hero.dragDropEasy: It is very easy to use, just drag and drop

intro.title: Design, publish, and automate every customer touchpoint from one workspace.

visualBuilder.label: Visual Builder
visualBuilder.title: Build AI chat journeys on your own terms without writing code.
visualBuilder.description: Design complex chatbot flows in a smooth drag-and-drop workspace. Manage logic, prompts, routing, and follow-ups from one place with full control over the building process.

multipleChannels.label: Multiple Channels
multipleChannels.title: Support customers across website, WhatsApp, live chat, and commerce channels.
multipleChannels.description: Deploy one AI workflow across your storefront, messaging apps, and CRM triggers. ZazuBot captures leads, resolves support requests, and keeps every channel in sync.

templates.label: Templates
templates.title: Launch with ready-to-use templates and customize them in minutes.
templates.description: Start from proven chatbot stories for support, sales, and onboarding. Each template is customizable, so you can adapt the flow to your own brand and process quickly.

publish.label: Publish
publish.title: Match the chat widget to your brand and publish anywhere.
publish.description: Control how and where your chatbot appears on your website. Customize colors, launcher styles, and interaction patterns to deliver a consistent branded experience.

useCases.title: Use the power of AI chatbots and get ahead of 99% of your competitors.

integrations.title: Connect AI providers, messaging apps, scheduling, and automation tools in one place.
integrations.description: Reuse the same ZazuBot logic across lead capture, support, order tracking, and appointment booking. Connect your workflows without rebuilding the conversation layer each time.
integrations.pageTitle: Support customers on multiple channels and connect every critical tool.
integrations.pageDescription: Deploy one conversation system across your website, WhatsApp, scheduling flows, AI providers, and downstream automations.
integrations.ecosystemDescription: ZazuBot lets your team reuse the same logic, prompts, and routing across AI support, lead capture, appointment booking, and escalations.

testimonials.title: What our clients are saying
testimonials.description: Do not just take our word for it. Teams across support, sales, and education are already shipping conversations on ZazuBot.

pricing.title: Choose your plan
pricing.description: Flexible plans that scale with your team, traffic, and automation needs.
pricing.pageTitle: Flexible plans that scale with your business.
pricing.pageDescription: Whether you are a solo operator, a growing startup, or an enterprise team, ZazuBot gives you a clear path from testing to production deployment.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about pricing, subscriptions, and rollout.

0.question: What payment methods do you accept?
0.answer: We accept all major credit cards, Mada, and bank transfers. Enterprise customers can also request invoicing with agreed payment terms.

1.question: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
1.answer: Yes. You can cancel from your account settings at any time and keep access until the end of the paid billing period.

2.question: Is there a free trial available?
2.answer: Yes. The free plan gives you a 14-day testing window so you can validate flows before upgrading.

3.question: Do you offer discounts for non-profits or educational institutions?
3.answer: Yes. Contact the sales team with your details and we can discuss special pricing for eligible organizations.

4.question: Can I change my plan later?
4.answer: Absolutely. You can upgrade or downgrade as your volume changes.

cta.title: Launch the first ZazuBot flow that your team will actually keep using.
cta.description: Start with a free test build, connect your channels, and move from scripted support to AI-assisted conversations fast.

features.pageDescription: Learn about ZazuBot benefits that make your business stand out. Automate support, marketing, and sales with AI.

about.heroDescription: We believe meaningful conversations are the foundation of successful relationships. Messaging is where people naturally engage, and businesses should meet them there with the same speed, relevance, and personality.
about.missionText: Businesses should harness the dynamics of real conversations, because where people love to chat, conversions and customer loyalty grow.
about.visionText: Move beyond scripted, transactional responses and give businesses the tools to craft lively, personalized conversations that reflect their own voice.
about.partnershipText: SFGCO has made a significant investment in ZazuBot, reflecting confidence in the platform's potential to transform how support, automation, and AI work together.
about.partnershipSupport: That support positions ZazuBot at the forefront of automation-led growth and gives customers a strong long-term technology partner.
about.valuesTitle: Supercharge your business with ZazuBot intelligence.
about.valuesDescription: These principles guide everything we build.

0.title: Messaging APIs

2.title: Website Widget
